title: wolfhsm crypto: Ed25519 and Curve25519
description: ed25519.rs: Ed25519Key{id:KeyId} with generate, load, commit, evict, public_key_bytes(->[u8;32]), sign (wh_Client_Ed25519Sign with type=0,context=NULL,contextLen=0 — no shim needed, allocate ed25519_key on heap), verify, signer()->Ed25519Signer. Ed25519Signer impl signature::Signer<ed25519::Signature>. curve25519.rs: Curve25519Key{id:KeyId} with generate, load, commit, evict, public_key_bytes, diffie_hellman(peer_public:&[u8;32])->[u8;32] via wolfhsm_curve25519_shared_secret shim.
